since_last: 65% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.76%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.26% · Gold -1.24% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 65% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.76%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.76%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.32%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.32%, MU +3.67%, LSCC +3.35%, QCOM +2.46%, VRT +2.41%. Laggards: SAP -2.21%, BABA -1.27%, PLTR -0.76%, CHKP -0.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.61% at $157.07
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.61% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
